headline: Sempra’s Gas Rate Decline And Grid Role Versus Current Valuation
summary: Southern California Gas Company, part of Sempra (NYSE:SRE), released a report describing a significant long term decline in average residential natural gas rates. The report highlights how existing gas infrastructure supported grid reliability and energy supply during recent weather events. SoCalGas also outlined how natural gas systems can work alongside renewables to support California’s energy transition. For you as an investor, this update offers a view into what Sempra actually...

headline: A Look At Sempra (SRE) Valuation As Recent Gains Meet Mixed Signals On Earnings And P/E Premium
summary: What Sempra’s Recent Performance Signals for Investors Sempra (SRE) has moved quietly on the market’s radar, with the stock posting a 1.7% gain over the past day, a small decline over the past month, and a 9.3% return over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Sempra. At a share price of $93.91, Sempra’s short term share price returns are mixed, but the 9.3% 3 month share price return and 29.9% 1 year total shareholder return indicate that momentum has been building over a longer...
